summary: Iter 254 e2e verification: Team & Roles page revamp + single-owner-per-operator invariant + admin operator preview modal redesign + icon-only buttons / ViewModeToggle. Backend pytest 6/6 PASS, frontend smoke covering the operator + super-admin flows confirms every spec point. No regressions surfaced.

issues: Radix DialogContent still warns: `Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined}` — a11y nit, not a blocker, but worth adding a <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby for screen-reader users.

action_items: (Optional polish) Add a DialogDescription to the AdminModal in OperatorsManagement.jsx to silence the Radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Single-owner invariant correctly enforced in TWO places: routes/operator_users.py L211-223 (POST create — even though L204 validator only allows local_admin|local_user the defensive 409 check is sound) and L449-472 (PUT promote — 409 with explicit existing-owner email in detail). Solid belt-and-braces.

operators/{id}/users/assign (line 338-410) does NOT enforce the single-owner invariant — a super_admin can `POST /assign` with operator_role='owner' for a user that already has another owner in the same operator. Recommend adding the same `existing_owner` check in assign_existing_user.
migrate_single_owner_per_operator.py is idempotent and writes audit_log rows with stable, deterministic _id (`single-owner-migration:<userid>:<ts>`). Re-running is safe — verified.

TeamRolesManagement.jsx falls back to local_user role label when operator_role is unknown (line 131) — but server may also return `manager` post-migration. Add a `manager` entry to roleConfig so the badge renders correctly for the 2 users demoted by the migration.

IconButton.jsx — clean implementation; auto-derives data-testid from the label which is great for testing. Side note: passing `as={Component}` then setting `type='button'` only when Component==='button' is correct (avoids invalid type attr on <a>).
ViewModeToggle.jsx — aria-pressed reflects active state correctly. Border-r last:border-r-0 handles 3-button divider cleanly.

success_rate.backend: 100% (6/6 pytest cases: migration audit verified, no >1 owner exists, PUT promote→409, POST create→400/409, operator self-read OK, role scoping OK)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Team&Roles page renders Ratings-style header + chip strip + slim tabs + footer with 0 big gradient tiles; Refresh icon button + tooltip 'Refresh' + aria-label OK; admin /operators top-bar has Add icon-only + More-filters icon-only + 3-button ViewModeToggle with tooltips; eye-icon AdminModal opens with slate hero + #082c59 tabs + no rainbow gradients; Roles tab shows OperatorRolesManagement scoped to picked operator)

test_credentials: Used /app/memory/test_credentials.md → operator@test.com (owner of Musango Bus Service) + superadmin@oryno.com + admin@test.com, all with testpassword123.
seed_data_creation: One transient TEST_iter254_<uuid>@example.com local_user created during PUT-promote-to-owner negative test; deleted at end of test (both via DELETE endpoint and direct Mongo cleanup).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter254 baseline: 6/6 backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_iter254_single_owner.py. Operator URL is /management/team-roles. AdminModal is opened from /admin/operators by clicking the Eye icon on any operator row (7 operators in seed). Single-owner invariant covers POST + PUT but not POST /assign — flagged for E1. Migration audit log retains 2 demote_extra_owner rows (one for SpandeX Hotels demoting doemonroe-spandex@gmail.com, one for Laudro-Automation demoting john.cena@laundro-auto.com). operator@test.com is locked as owner of operator 30c487d8-... .
rca of the issue: N/A — feature verification, no bugs found.
